# Full Kit Marketing

> Full Kit Marketing is a lean, high-trust marketing consultancy for growing service-based businesses.
> It specializes in 0-1 marketing: getting businesses with little or no marketing infrastructure fully
> set up, strategically aligned, and operating with the systems and roadmap they need to scale.
> Tagline: "Marketing that moves small business forward."

## What it is
- A consultancy, not an agency. A catalyst, not a menu of services.
- Founded by Rachel Beck (Founder & CEO), an Oregon LLC, 2026.
- Senior marketing strategy paired with hands-on execution, right-sized for small business.
- Industry-agnostic within the service sector; e-commerce is out of scope.

## Who it serves
- Growing service businesses: hospitality, trades, professional services, SaaS, consulting, and more.
- 2–100 employees, 0–1 in-house marketers, real revenue, ready to grow.
- Decision maker: business owner, founder, or CEO. Budget signal: willing to invest $2,000+/month.

## Core service areas (drawn on as needed, never a preset package)
1. Marketing strategy & planning — audit + strategic roadmap tied to business objectives.
2. Messaging & positioning — value proposition, differentiation, cross-channel messaging framework.
3. Content strategy & creation — production and distribution to grow audience and loyalty.
4. Marketing operations & automation — tech stack, automation, reporting backbone, and AI tools (a core differentiator).
5. Reporting & analytics — frameworks and dashboards around the metrics that matter.
6. Custom brand activations — "wow moments" that bring the brand to life.

## Engagement models
- Monthly retainer: $3,000–$4,000/month — ongoing strategic partnership.
- Project engagement: $100/hour — discrete, defined-scope deliverables.
- Specialist work (curated network) is scoped into estimates upfront.

## Contact
- Email: rachel@fullkitmarketing.com
- Website: https://fullkitmarketing.com/
